{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220454166624D3DEC37292D5126A"}"},"total":6553},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7518087013367890750","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯……还不错，男女老少皆宜。这个应该算男频？很不错了，没有其他一些男频的通病。很多男频有女主，把女主写成一个累赘。虽然读者骂女主多余，但实际上完全是作者不会写的缘故。有些无cp，尽管没有女主，但是对一些女性角色的描写很low感觉生活在纯男性世界。这篇目前看我觉得比较客观，我没看多少后面不知道。男主总的来讲很不错，会关心父母也有正常怜悯心，少见的三观正派唉。确实不是纯爽，其实我觉得算是很有趣的一篇文，作者用的一些梗和比喻很有意思，虽然因为不涉猎有的我有点看不懂，但不影响我知道应该是某个梗还蛮有趣。文中有很多军事类描写，抗战片既视感，不愧是军迷啊。因为太多地方不了解，所以我读书速度大大降低，需要动脑理解，而且写的好长。所以其实不算我喜欢的类型，但是认可写的很好，所以留个五星好评[注意]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750453056,"group_id":"7376231037434612798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说深度依赖，不错的书架喜欢的评星，不挑类型挑文笔无任何属性","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8weWvUTvU0ypZHs/rMm/J8A7IWUujXpbgTaF1hgq2Ny","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/14acfe33f25e4869b746ee98a004dfb6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710374&x-signature=e30xG8333XlHPAirQngtxuHRd0Q%3D","user_id":"1286891417113879","user_name":"书里两万里"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1286891417113879","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"737623103743461279
